fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: UVXY, a leveraged ETF designed to track volatility, is highlighted as one of ten leveraged ETFs built to lose money. This cautionary note suggests significant downside risk for holders of such instruments, particularly over longer time horizons. Investors should be aware of the inherent structural decay and potential for substantial capital loss associated with leveraged ETFs like UVXY.

headlines.title: Stop Trading These 10 Leveraged ETFs Built to Lose
